# VerL Runtime Subset

This directory contains the modified VerL 0.4.1.dev runtime used by
AgentGuard-Zero. Upstream examples, tests, recipes, documentation, and
container files are omitted from this source release.

Upstream project: https://github.com/volcengine/verl

License: Apache-2.0. See `../VERL_LICENSE` and `../VERL_NOTICE.txt`.
